factors.issue: Mutable tag — must pin to digest for reproducibility
pip install without --require-hashes — wheel content not verified
pip version not pinned — inherits from base image, varies across rebuilds
factors.repair: RUN pip install --upgrade pip==<version> before package install

factors.issue: Build platform not declared — digest differs between linux/amd64 and linux/arm64
factors.repair: Declare --platform=linux/amd64 in FROM or via docker build --platform
Remove BUILD_DATE from image layers; use OCI label only if needed
